title: PipeShare DB3 pipe graph and saved workspace layouts
description:
Remote folder DB3 bindings now follow the same client/job scope as the file explorer, so the pipe graph and inspection data stay aligned when you browse cloud jobs. Changing the selected video or editing a folder DB3 binding reloads inspection instead of showing stale graph data.

Workspace settings now let you save named panel layouts (quick load dropdown, Save current as, delete) in addition to workspace tabs. Layouts sync to your account on BASE and SaaS PipeShare.

Who is affected: PipeShare users on pipeshare.live (private BASE server) with remote/cloud jobs and custom workspace layouts.
changeLog: DB3 folder bindings scoped to active remote tree client/job.
Inspection reloads when video selection or DB3 binding changes.
Saved layouts section in workspace settings with quick load.
Save current layout as named preset (up to 12).
Delete selected saved layout from settings modal.
